ddls:
CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient for whom the prediction is made */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Predicted class (0 = non-diabetic, 1 = diabetic) */,
  "scored_class" INTEGER /* Scored class from the prediction model */,
  "scored_probability" REAL /* Probability score for the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the prediction model used */,
  "risk_factors" TEXT /* Summary of the risk factors identified by the model */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Personalized recommendations for the patient */,
  "next_follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the next follow-up */,
  "follow_up_status" TEXT /* Status of the follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each prediction record
Reference to the patient for whom the prediction is made
Scored class from the prediction model
Date when the prediction was made
Version of the prediction model used
Summary of the risk factors identified by the model
